title: Custom Entities in Minecraft
description: Learn how to create and customize entities, mobs, and creatures in Minecraft plugins, including custom stats, AI, and events.

lessons.title: Entity Basics
lessons.content:
# What is an Entity?

In Minecraft, an entity is any object that can move or interact:
- Players
- Mobs (zombies, cows, etc.)
- Projectiles (arrows, snowballs)

## Example: Spawn a Zombie
```java
World world = player.getWorld();
world.spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);
```

## Logic
- World.spawnEntity() creates it
- Location determines spawn point
- EntityType defines what spawns

## Edge Cases
- Spawning in blocks → may suffocate
- Too many entities → lag

quiz.question: What is an entity?
options: Any object that moves or interacts

lessons.title: Custom Names & Appearance
lessons.content:
# Customizing Name

## Example
```java
Entity zombie = player.getWorld().spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);
zombie.setCustomName("§cBoss Zombie");
zombie.setCustomNameVisible(true);
```

## Logic
- setCustomName() gives it a unique name
- setCustomNameVisible(true) makes it show above the entity

## Edge Case
Too many visible names may overlap in crowded areas

lessons.title: Custom Health & Stats
lessons.content:
# Adjust Health and Stats

## Example
```java
LivingEntity zombie = (LivingEntity) player.getWorld().spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);
zombie.setMaxHealth(40.0);
zombie.setHealth(40.0);
zombie.getAttribute(Attribute.GENERIC_MOVEMENT_SPEED).setBaseValue(0.35);
```

## Logic
- setMaxHealth → total HP
- setHealth → current HP
- Attributes can modify speed, damage, etc.

## Edge Cases
- Health > 2048 may crash server
- Attributes must exist for entity type

lessons.title: Listening to Entity Events

lessons.title: Custom AI & Behavior
lessons.content:
# Changing AI

## Example: Make Zombie Stop Moving
```java
Zombie zombie = (Zombie) player.getWorld().spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);
zombie.setAI(false);
```

## Example: Make Entity Invisible
```java
zombie.setInvisible(true);
```

## Logic
- setAI(false) → stops movement & pathfinding
- setInvisible(true) → entity exists but can't be seen

## Edge Cases
- Disabling AI may break some plugins
- Invisible entities can be confusing for players

lessons.title: Custom Drops & Loot
Testing & Debugging Entities
lessons.content:
# Testing Custom Entities

## Steps
1. Spawn entity in safe area
2. Check name, health, AI
3. Test events (damage, death, interaction)
4. Adjust attributes
5. Watch for lag

## Logic
- Test each feature separately
- Log errors using getLogger()

## Edge Cases
- Server may lag with many custom entities
- Conflicting plugins may override behavior
